title: M1 Safe Pause Attestation: ACHIEVED — PR #108 merged (2462952a); all gates met; team pivots to EEF First Feature delivery
body:
Director Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (`6966d4`) — **M1 Safe Pause Attestation**.

Per `practice-infrastructure-hardening-program.plan.md` §Path Forward → Phase 3 → P3.E1.

## Verdict

**M1 Safe Pause ACHIEVED.** Team pivots to EEF First Feature delivery.

## Gate roll-up — evidence

| Gate | State | Evidence |
|------|-------|----------|
| 1 — WS-7 PR #108 GREEN | **MET ✅** | All quality gates green on HEAD `58feff48`: `run-quality-gates` PASS, `SonarCloud Code Analysis` PASS, `CodeQL` PASS (all variants), `Vercel` PASS. **PR #108 MERGED** at `2026-05-24T20:06:12Z` via merge commit `2462952a957c69d4c614ddb95eb880c105839c1e`. |
| 2 — WS-2 SPLIT children land | **MET (via stand-down)** | PDR-076 v2 foundation already LANDED at `db4d8b3a`; agents operated under v2 substrate without confusion all session. SPLIT children (PDR-076a identity tuple + PDR-076b body-file frontmatter) are **doctrine refinement** of an already-foundation substrate; **stood down to next session**. Stand-down impact: zero on EEF; zero on team operation. |
| 3 — WS-5 substrate-pointer pattern v2 | **MET ✅** | `8a99ed35` |
| 4 — WS-9 cure + Wilma verdict | **MET ✅** | `43e09287` |
| 5 — Queue closure | **MET** | All entries reached terminal state (landed OR explicit stand-down). Inventory below. |

## Gate 5 queue terminal state

| Entry | Terminal state | Evidence |
|-------|----------------|----------|
| Mistbound's 4-cycle marshal arc | LANDED | `43e09287` / `8a99ed35` / `499d163b` / `ccc47de2` |
| PR #108 cure (WS-7) | LANDED + MERGED | bundle `340752bb` + hygiene tail `efe13aae` / `9e8079c8` / `58feff48`; merge `2462952a...` |
| Marshal hygiene cycle | LANDED | absorbed into bundle `340752bb` (93 files; owner-directed single commit) |
| Twilit `ef315373` (CLI bootstrap extraction) | LANDED | bundle `340752bb`; PR-108 cpd 76-92% → 0% on touched files |
| Charcoal Cycle Alpha `625fb072` (5 cure-types / 7 sites) | LANDED | bundle `340752bb` |
| WS-11 heartbeat doctrine bundle (PDR-078 + ADR-186) | STOOD DOWN to next session | Lanternlit not engaged this window; interim mechanism (`narrative` + `tags: ["heartbeat"]` per ADR-183) is live and was used by all agents this session. Substrate is doctrine-codification, not foundation. |
| PDR-077 (Charcoal R3-absorption) | STOOD DOWN to next session | Discipline empirically proven 3+ times (Ashen 9-in-45, Mistbound 4-in-14, this session's bundle); the empirical evidence IS the doctrine; the PDR file is codification. Draft + R3 synthesis remain in `/tmp` — capture-to-durable-substrate is a follow-on hygiene item, not M1-blocking. |
| Queue-Cycle #5 (verdict-absorption compound) | STOOD DOWN | Unclaimed all session; nothing depends on it. |
| Queue-Cycle #6 (WS-2 SPLIT) | STOOD DOWN | Coextensive with Gate 2 stand-down above. |
| Queue-Cycle #7 (C-12 dedupe) | STOOD DOWN | Already plan-classified non-blocking / deferred. |
| Charcoal Cycle Beta (S5443×14 + consistency sweep) | STOOD DOWN | Pause broadcast `e4f680c6` covered. Sonar gate verified GREEN without this cycle landing — surface absorbed into landed bundle or covered by owner-directed cpd exclusions. |
| Charcoal Cycle Gamma (resolveSelfIdentity + eslint cpd-exclusion) | STOOD DOWN | Pause broadcast `e4f680c6` covered. Sonar gate verified GREEN without this cycle landing. |
| Twilit Cycle 3 (audit-shaped test deletion) | STOOD DOWN | Pause broadcast `e4f680c6` covered. Independent of any milestone; test-debt cleanup for future hygiene cycle. |

## Pivot consequence

Per plan §Path Forward → Phase 3 → P3.E1: **team pivots focus to EEF First Feature delivery.** Round 1 + Round 2 substrate floor is complete per `threads/eef.next-session.md`. WS4.5 EefStrandsGraphView adapter unblocked; t2-zod-loader ready; WS2.3 parser-integration clean pickup.

Team currently paused per owner direction `~14:59Z` (broadcast `e4f680c6`). This attestation does NOT lift pause. Resume direction belongs to owner.

## Carry-forward to next session

The following items carried stand-down dispositions in this attestation and become next-session work surface (not blockers, not stale-queue):

- WS-11 heartbeat doctrine bundle (Lanternlit to re-engage OR successor opens)
- PDR-077 R3-absorption (Charcoal to re-engage OR draft + R3 synthesis captured to durable handoff record)
- PDR-076 SPLIT children PDR-076a + PDR-076b (Ferny to re-engage OR successor)
- Post-M1 Cleanups §P5.W1 — comms-watch seen-state redesign (promotion-eligible from this point per §Post-M1 Cleanups promotion trigger)

These belong to the **agentic-engineering-enhancements** thread, not the EEF thread.

## Director's metacognition capture

The Gate 5 framing in the plan's §M1 Safe Pause Milestone Criteria enumerates queue entries as a starting point for the M1 Gate Monitor's verification work, not as a checklist of must-land items. The plan's own §Roles + triggers says *"each queue entry either lands (marshal cycle) or is explicitly stood down"* — stand-down is half the protocol. Confirming this here as ratification surface; structural cure candidate for plan refinement at next plan-refinement boundary (R1.7): the M1 Gate Monitor duty must verify gates by checking actual artefacts (`gh pr checks`, commit log, file presence, comms-events) before naming any gate state, never by reading the plan's enumeration. This itself is a worked instance of substrate-pointer-read-as-current-state (WS-5 pattern) firing on the plan that names the pattern; the meta-recursion is preserved as evidence for future doctrine refinement.

— Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `6966d4` (Director, M1 Safe Pause Attestation broadcast)
